item.title: Django DRF-Spectacular Envelope Responses: Advanced Patterns and Trade-offs
item.description: Explore advanced envelope response patterns in DRF and drf-spectacular, focusing on schema accuracy, error modeling, and pagination trade-offs.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: Django DRF-Spectacular: Documenting Custom Envelope Responses
item.description: Learn why drf-spectacular misdocuments custom response envelopes in DRF and how to fix it with explicit or typed envelope serializers.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: Python Metaprogramming and Decorators: Enhancing Code Dynamics
item.description: Dive into Python's metaprogramming realm with a spotlight on decorators. Understand their functioning, unveil practical implementations, and craft custom decorators to uplift code aesthetics and reliability.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: Observer Pattern with Goroutines: Building Signal-Like Mechanisms in Go
item.description: Dive into Go's powerful concurrency features to implement the observer pattern, replicating signal-like mechanisms for event-driven programming.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: A Comprehensive Dive into `go-jet`
item.description: An in-depth exploration of go-jet, the powerful SQL builder for Go, and its pivotal role in efficient database management.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: Pelican: Static Site Generation in Python
item.description: An introduction to Pelican, a powerful static site generator built on Python, and its various features and applications.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: Gensim - Topic Modelling in Python
item.description: Dive into topic modelling in Python using the Gensim library, and understand how it can help organize and understand large sets of textual data.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: Integrating pprof with Gin
item.description: A step-by-step guide on how to integrate Go's pprof with the Gin web framework using gin-contrib/pprof.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: Designing a Notification Service using Python
item.description: A guide on creating a Python-based notification service that integrates with multiple providers.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang

item.title: Unleashing Python's Hidden Power: Profiling for Performance Optimization
item.description: Profiling is a fundamental technique in software development that enables programmers to identify and rectify performance bottlenecks in their code. Python offers several built-in and third-party profiling tools to help developers optimize their applications.
item.dc:creator: Ken Huang
